scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pap/storage build && pnpm --filter @pap/tools-web-readability build && tsc -b tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pap/storage build && pnpm --filter @pap/tools-web-readability build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm run build && vitest run test
